phrases.intent_en: Is the cave dining room open now?
phrases.text_local: Mağara yemek salonu şu an açık mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Seating availability in cave restaurants can change by season and reservation.

likely_response.translation_en: It is open, please come in.

responses.english: It is open, please come in.

phrases.intent_en: Should I remove shoes for cushion seating?
phrases.text_local: Minderli oturma için ayakkabı çıkarmalı mıyım?
phrases.cultural_note: Shoe removal etiquette on traditional Turkish seating varies by establishment.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, shoes are removed in the cushion seating area.

responses.english: Yes, shoes are removed in the cushion seating area.

phrases.text_local: Bu akşam testi kebabı var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Turkish restaurant staff often confirm daily specials verbally rather than posting them.

phrases.intent_en: Do I pay at the table or register?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment customs vary in Turkish restaurants; it is polite to confirm with staff.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the register.

responses.english: You can pay at the register.
